content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on June 23, 2026, focused on infrastructure and core stability. The team opened three pull requests addressing direct-reply logic, cloud job recovery, and agent web-fetch configurations to improve system reliability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Core Logic Improvements:**
    *   [#9074](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9074): Implements a fallback mechanism to the uncapped path when the direct-reply fast path is unable to serve requests.
*   **Cloud and Agent Infrastructure:**
    *   [#9072](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9072): Adjusts stale-job recovery sizing to exceed cold-boot worst-case scenarios, aiming to prevent provision flapping.
    *   [#9070](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9070): Updates agent logic to honor `{ all: true }` lookups for pinned dual-stack web-fetch, addressing "Invalid IP: undefined" errors.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None.*
